snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-40912 - Traefik: StripPrefixRegex auth bypass via P"; content:"CVE-2026-40912"; nocase; sid:3922876; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
